user.name: FENG DONG
user.description: Author of Nuo Model Viewer. Programming C++, Lua, DirectX, Windows, iOS, macOS, Metal. Linux kernel fan. Atheism leads to singularity and God save us.

fullText: 上周一有个数据在 UI 和 DB 之间同步的问题怎么都调不好。郁闷之后就 switch gear 干别的去了。这几天脑子清醒，想出来要怎么调试。一调试发现，原来之前调用都是在 animation 结束的时候。现在没了 animation，加上 300ms delay，成功！就是这个底层 code 写的估计有点儿问题。只能暂时不管。

fullText:
在我面临的编程问题上，可以毫不夸张的说，Codex 的 GPT-5.4 > Claude Code Opus 4.6 了，方案设计和理解上，都比 4.6 更优秀。

但是由于 Codex 的废话问题、过度推理问题等等，各方面表现掩盖住了这一特点。所以，目前我的建议是双持，主力 Claude Code Opus 4.6，然后写个 skills，让 CC 调用 Codex

🏜️ Version 1.4 Home Afar is Out Now! 

WWM Desert: 100h Mega Expansion — Ride the wind to the sands, your Hexi adventure begins. Defeat the boss & win epic rewards.

user.name: Matt Mullenweg
user.description: I can think. I can wait. I can fast.

fullText:
"Governments of the Industrial World, you weary giants of flesh and steel, I come from Cyberspace, the new home of Mind. On behalf of the future, I ask you of the past to leave us alone. You are not welcome among us. You have no sovereignty where we gather."
